data.title: Bitcoin options could pave the path for new BTC price highs — Here is how
data.description:
Key takeaways:97% of the $8. 3 billion in Bitcoin put options expire worthless at a $102,000 BTC price. Short covering above $105,000 could trigger a Bitcoin price rally to new highs. Bitcoin (BTC) soared above $101,000 on May 8, reaching its highest level in over three months
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-options-could-pave-the-path-for-new-btc-price-highs-here-is-how?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: XRP News: Ripple Settles With SEC, Agrees to $50 Million Fine Amid XRP Legal Resolution
data.description:
Ripple and SEC reach agreement to conclude long-standing legal battle; $125M escrow to be partially returnedRipple Labs and the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) have officially reached a settlement, concluding one of the most closely watched legal battles in the crypto space. Key Points:Ripple will pay a $50 million fine to the SEC
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/23984804793737?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Apple Develops Specialized Chips for Glasses and AI Servers
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Apple is working on developing specialized chips for glasses and artificial intelligence servers under the project name 'BALTRA.' The company aims to begin mass production of these glasses chips by 2026 or 2027, positioning them to compete with Meta Platforms' RAY-BAN smart glasses.

data.title: Gold Prices Decline as Spot Gold Falls Below $3,320
data.description: According to BlockBeats, spot gold prices have dropped below $3,320 per ounce, experiencing a 1.34% decrease during the day. Meanwhile, New York gold futures have seen a significant decline of 2.00%, currently trading at $3,323.90 per ounce.
